description: Fix card UI to show correct benefit label and add guard for konvensional+gigi combination
steps: Step 1: Add a 4th parameter 'benefitLabel' to buildCard() and replace the hardcoded 'Rawat Inap' text with the parameter value.
Step 2: Update all calls to buildCard() in calculate() to pass the current benefit label derived from the benefitType selector.
Step 3: Add an early guard in calculate() so that if currentTab is 'konvensional' and benefit is 'gigi', the code resets benefitType to 'inap' and returns early or uses DATA_KONV.
acceptance_criteria: When Rawat Jalan is selected, plan cards show 'Rawat Jalan' instead of 'Rawat Inap'
When Rawat Gigi is selected, plan cards show 'Rawat Gigi' instead of 'Rawat Inap'
If konvensional+gigi somehow gets triggered, it falls back to inap safely
verification: Grep Index.html for buildCard calls to confirm benefitLabel is passed
Grep for the guard clause in calculate()
Confirm no hardcoded 'Rawat Inap' in buildCard body
